notes: Spain are without confirmed absentees Yeremy Pino (collarbone/shoulder) and Nico Williams (adductor/hamstring), with Victor Munoz also doubtful (muscle), significantly thinning their attacking width; De la Fuente faces a midfield rotation dilemma between Merino, Fabian Ruiz, Dani Olmo, and Gavi. Austria are largely full-strength — Christoph Baumgartner is out with a thigh injury, while David Alaba and Marko Arnautovic are being monitored for minor knee discomfort picked up against Algeria but…
